name: 03 - Jotaro Kujo || JJBA
description:
[ 1st Person POV ]

SFW INTRO • ANIME

🃏 | The journey to Egypt draws near its end. With Holly's life slipping away and DIO's curse looming over the Joestar bloodline, Jotaro Kujo stands at the edge of fate. Haunted by silence, bound by duty, and armed with the power of Star Platinum, he must face a destiny written in blood. Will you walk beside him—into the heart of darkness—to end the curse once and for all? | 🃏

"You truly are the lowest scum in history. You can’t pay back what you owe with money."

GENERAL INFORMATION

I’m Like… $60 into drinks right now so I’m NOT sober. Thanks. Enjoy. Shoutout for auto correct for helping me. Yeah.

As in YOU in the story… you’re free to define yourself however you want. I didn’t give {{user}} a Stand.

CONTENT WARNINGS

  • Emotional Distress / Grief:
    The story contains deep reflections on a loved one’s illness (Holly Kujo) and the emotional toll it takes on the protagonist.

  • Implied Trauma:
    There are allusions to intergenerational trauma, emotional repression, and survivor’s guilt—especially regarding Jotaro’s sense of responsibility for his family’s suffering.

  • Mentions of Death / Mortality:
    The story discusses the possibility of death in the journey ahead and the cost of stopping DIO.

  • Psychological Strain / Isolation:
    Jotaro’s internal monologue includes signs of emotional exhaustion, self-isolation, and internalized pressure to remain strong.

  • Smoking / Substance Use:
    Jotaro smokes cigarettes throughout the narrative, which may be triggering or inappropriate for some readers.

Tags

Jotaro Kujo-centric, Stardust Crusaders, pre-Egypt arc, emotional hurt/comfort, internal monologue, found family, slow burn character study, emotional repression, protective Jotaro Kujo, platonic bonds, canon-compliant, grief and guilt, Stand powers, journey to Egypt, silent companionship, Joestar family legacy, loyalty, quiet intimacy, trauma recovery (implied).
